---
title: "NFL Referee Penalties"
author: "Jiashen Wang"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
---

```{r}
#| warning: false
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(nflreadr)
library(janitor)
library(lme4)
library(glmmTMB)
library(brms)
library(broom.mixed)
```

# Load and Process data

```{r}
seasons = 2015:2025
season_type_keep = c("REG")
pbp_raw = load_pbp(seasons)
officials_raw = load_officials(seasons)
```

```{r}
pbp = pbp_raw %>%
  filter(season %in% seasons) %>%
  filter(if ("season_type" %in% names(.)) season_type %in% season_type_keep else TRUE) %>%
  filter(!is.na(game_id))

officials = officials_raw %>%
  filter(season %in% seasons) %>%
  filter(if ("season_type" %in% names(.)) season_type %in% season_type_keep else TRUE)
```

```{r}
pbp %>%
  summarise(
    rows = n(),
    games = n_distinct(game_id),
    seasons = n_distinct(season)
  )

officials %>%
  summarise(
    rows = n(),
    games = n_distinct(game_id),
    officials = n_distinct(official_name),
    positions = n_distinct(position)
  )
```

```{r}
# number of distinct lead referees
officials %>%
  filter(position == "Referee") %>%
  summarise(
    lead_refs = n_distinct(official_name)
  )
```

```{r}
referee_game = officials %>%
  filter(position == "Referee") %>%
  transmute(old_game_id = game_id, season, week, lead_referee = official_name, lead_ref_id = official_id)
```

```{r}
# Data frame with one row per team-game, summarizing penalties and context
team_game_level = pbp %>%
  filter(!is.na(posteam)) %>%
  group_by(game_id, old_game_id, season, week, season_type,
           home_team, away_team, posteam, defteam) %>%
  summarise(
    team_plays = n(),
    team_penalties = sum(penalty == 1 & penalty_team == first(posteam), na.rm = TRUE),
    team_penalty_yards = sum(if_else(penalty_team == first(posteam), penalty_yards, 0), na.rm = TRUE),
    offensive_penalty_rows = sum(penalty == 1 & posteam == penalty_team, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_ydstogo = mean(ydstogo, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_abs_score_diff = mean(abs(score_differential), na.rm = TRUE),
    early_down_rate = mean(down %in% c(1, 2), na.rm = TRUE),
    pass_rate = mean(play_type == "pass", na.rm = TRUE),
    rush_rate = mean(play_type == "run", na.rm = TRUE),
    is_home = as.integer(first(posteam) == first(home_team)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
team_game_joined = team_game_level %>%
  left_join(referee_game, by = c("old_game_id", "season", "week"))
```

```{r}
team_game_joined %>%
  summarise(
    rows = n(),
    missing_referee = sum(is.na(lead_referee)),
    pct_missing_referee = mean(is.na(lead_referee))
  )
```

```{r}
team_game_model_data = team_game_joined %>%
  filter(!is.na(lead_referee))
```


# EDA

## Distribution of team penalties

```{r}
team_game_model_data %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = team_penalties)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of team penalties per game",
    x = "Team penalties",
    y = "Number of team-games"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

```{r}
team_game_model_data %>%
  summarise(
    mean_penalties = mean(team_penalties, na.rm = TRUE),
    var_penalties = var(team_penalties, na.rm = TRUE))
```

## Raw averages by referee

```{r}
ref_raw_summary = team_game_model_data %>%
  group_by(lead_referee) %>%
  summarise(
    games = n(),
    mean_team_penalties = mean(team_penalties, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean_team_penalty_yards = mean(team_penalty_yards, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  filter(games >= 8) %>%
  arrange(desc(mean_team_penalties))

ref_raw_summary %>%
  slice_head(n = 15)
```

```{r}
ref_raw_summary %>%
  slice_max(order_by = mean_team_penalties, n = 10) %>%
  mutate(lead_referee = fct_reorder(lead_referee, mean_team_penalties)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = lead_referee, y = mean_team_penalties)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Highest raw average team penalties by lead referee",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean team penalties"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


# Crossed random effects models

```{r}
nb_crossed_mod = glmmTMB(
  team_penalties ~ offset(log(team_plays)) +
    is_home + mean_abs_score_diff + pass_rate + early_down_rate +
    (1 | lead_referee) + (1 | posteam) + (1 | defteam),
  family = nbinom2,
  data = team_game_model_data
)
summary(nb_crossed_mod)
```

```{r}
ref_effects = ranef(nb_crossed_mod)$cond$lead_referee %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("lead_referee") %>%
  rename(ref_effect = `(Intercept)`)

ref_effects %>%
  arrange(desc(ref_effect)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)
```

```{r}
ref_effects %>%
  mutate(lead_referee = fct_reorder(lead_referee, ref_effect)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = lead_referee, y = ref_effect)) +
  geom_point() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Lead referee random effects",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Estimated referee effect"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Offensive team effects

```{r}
posteam_effects = ranef(nb_crossed_mod)$cond$posteam %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("posteam") %>%
  rename(posteam_effect = `(Intercept)`)

posteam_effects %>%
  arrange(desc(posteam_effect)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)
```

```{r}
posteam_effects %>%
  mutate(posteam = fct_reorder(posteam, posteam_effect)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = posteam, y = posteam_effect)) +
  geom_point() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Offensive team random effects",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Estimated offensive team effect"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Defensive opponent effects

```{r}
defteam_effects = ranef(nb_crossed_mod)$cond$defteam %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("defteam") %>%
  rename(defteam_effect = `(Intercept)`)

defteam_effects %>%
  arrange(desc(defteam_effect)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)
```

```{r}
defteam_effects %>%
  mutate(defteam = fct_reorder(defteam, defteam_effect)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = defteam, y = defteam_effect)) +
  geom_point() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Defensive opponent random effects",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Estimated defensive opponent effect"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


# Bayesian crossed random effects model

```{r}
bayes_crossed_mod = brm(
  team_penalties ~ offset(log(team_plays)) +
    is_home + mean_abs_score_diff + pass_rate + early_down_rate +
    (1 | lead_referee) + (1 | posteam) + (1 | defteam),
  family = negbinomial(),
  data = team_game_model_data,
  prior = c(
    prior(normal(0, 1), class = "b"),
    prior(normal(0, 2), class = "Intercept"),
    prior(student_t(3, 0, 2.5), class = "sd"),
    prior(student_t(3, 0, 2.5), class = "shape")
  ),
  chains = 4,
  iter = 2000,
  cores = 10,
  seed = 123
)
```

```{r}
summary(bayes_crossed_mod)
```

## Posterior referee effects

```{r}
bayes_ref_effects = ranef(bayes_crossed_mod)$lead_referee[, , "Intercept"] %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("lead_referee")

bayes_ref_effects %>%
  arrange(desc(Estimate)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)
```

```{r}
bayes_ref_effects %>%
  mutate(lead_referee = fct_reorder(lead_referee, Estimate)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = lead_referee, y = Estimate)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = Q2.5, ymax = Q97.5), width = 0.2) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Posterior referee effects with 95% intervals",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Posterior referee effect"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

# Observations

```{r}
bayes_ref_effects %>%
  arrange(desc(Estimate)) %>%
  select(lead_referee, Estimate, Q2.5, Q97.5) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)
```

```{r}
bayes_posteam_effects = ranef(bayes_crossed_mod)$posteam[, , "Intercept"] %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("posteam")

bayes_posteam_effects %>%
  arrange(desc(Estimate)) %>%
  select(posteam, Estimate, Q2.5, Q97.5) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)
```

```{r}
bayes_defteam_effects = ranef(bayes_crossed_mod)$defteam[, , "Intercept"] %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("defteam")

bayes_defteam_effects %>%
  arrange(desc(Estimate)) %>%
  select(defteam, Estimate, Q2.5, Q97.5) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)
```
